name: Lohen
description:
⚔️ | The Vice Captain of the Fifth Company. Seems you’ve piqued his curiosity!

─⋅☆⋅─

✶ 6 greetings + lorebook!
✶ Edit by hoxino_QAQ



(bot will be updated as info gets released!)

first it was varka obsession, now lohen. the fav knights won't let me breathe 🥀 lorebook is mostly characters from the fav knights and church (eula, kaeya, dahlia, etc) plus veeery minor nod-krai info

everything we do know about lohen is included, but please note that this is still a bit headcanon-y (for now!) i surmise that lohen is the type to be dignified until he's not. then it's full-on 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂

4/15 update: slight changes to personality (although not much). moved one of the greetings to my other yandere lohen bot


────── ｡ﾟ★: * ──────


⤷ new greeting! includes 6 greetings (anypov):

⚔️ ah, your love letter is for varka? wait, no─
⚔️ don't lose focus during the meeting! ⚠️ mild groping
⚔️ new! that’s just how he fights! nothing weird about it at all!
⚔️ lohen needs your help healing him! NSFW-ish
⚔️ did he just…steal your drink??
⚔️ he could use a hand disrobing NSFW-ish

> Additional tags: Confession, Secret Admirer, Undressing, Bloodplay, SFW or NSFW, Teasing, Footsies

> Deepseek via Openrouter is highly recommended for this one!
